---
name: Research question
about: A hypothesis the methodology should answer — the preferred issue type
title: "RQ: <question, e.g. 'How accurate are BUILD predictions?'>"
labels: research-question
---

## Question / hypothesis

<!-- One sentence, phrased as a question the evidence could answer. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- Which decision would the answer change? (Per docs/PRINCIPLES.md, it
should improve the quality of evidence, research, or decision-making.) -->

## What evidence would answer it

<!-- What data, comparison, or experiment would settle this? e.g. re-fetch
verdict markets after N months, compare predictions vs outcomes, A/B two
scoring formulas on the same review set. -->

## How to measure

<!-- The deterministic metric(s). Feature Forge principles apply: evidence
first, reproducible engine, interpretation on top. -->
